seo.title: Quick Monday Chicken - brown and delicious - Marinda Kook

html:
When you get home in a rush and wonder what on earth to make for supper, make the chicken. It's finger-lickin' good.

 

YOU NEED:

  • 6 chicken portions
  • 1 onion sliced into rings
  • 250 ml mayonnaise
  • 250 ml chutney
  • 250 ml milk
  • 1 packet mushroom, creamy chicken or white onion soup
  • salt and pepper to taste

NOW:

  1. slice the onion into rings and place at the bottom of an ovenproof dish
  2. pack the chicken on top of the onions
  3. sprinkle the soup powder over the chicken
  4. mix the rest of the ingredients and pour over the chicken
  5. cover it and bake for 45 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius
  6. open the dish and bake for another 20 minutes until nicely browned

It's delicious and can be enjoyed with rice, vegetables or salad.
